who: hospitality accountants processing 5–15 restaurant sales reports/month
offer: For hospitality accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late tax submissions. We automate tax format conversion instead of manual data entry into tax software.
problem: Inaccurate tax submissions due to manual data entry errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality accountants
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to hospitality accountants with demo video
Share in community forums for hospitality accountants
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface and tax format preview on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
